name: twojapoczta
description: TwojaPoczta. Poczta e-mail na własnym serwerze, zero zależności.

scripts.test: node --test tests/admin.test.js tests/aliases.test.js tests/teams.test.js tests/audit.test.js tests/settings.test.js tests/quota.test.js tests/api.test.js tests/api.extra.test.js tests/auth.test.js tests/attachments.test.js tests/db.test.js tests/dkim.test.js tests/dns-check.test.js tests/folders.test.js tests/dkim-init.test.js tests/index.test.js tests/mail.test.js tests/mime.test.js tests/router.test.js tests/smtp.test.js tests/smtp-in.test.js tests/smtp-out.test.js tests/smtp-starttls.test.js tests/static.test.js tests/tls-cert.test.js tests/x509.test.js
